steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage defines extinct languages and then uses Umbrian as a case in point. The blank must introduce a specific illustration of a general principle.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Therefore': signals a conclusion drawn from prior reasoning. No argument precedes the blank, so a concluding transition is wrong. ✗
  • Choice B — 'However': signals a contrast or concession. Umbrian isn't being opposed to anything here. ✗
  • Choice C — 'For example': signals that a specific instance illustrates the general definition just given. Umbrian is exactly that instance. ✓
  • Choice D — 'As a result': signals a consequence. Umbrian is not a consequence of the definition. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
